subject: Chairman Rose — suited corporate figure standing at a stadium venue
description: A sharply dressed man in a grey suit and waistcoat stands confidently at what appears to be a large sports stadium or arena. His posture is upright and composed, arms at his sides or slightly forward. The stadium seating and structure are visible behind him, suggesting a position of authority or ownership over the venue. The overall palette is warm and neutral with the stadium backdrop rendered in muted blues and grays.
foreground: suited man standing on stadium grounds
